'''ây-dh-v-th''' ('''kayadhvethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberstamp|rubberstamp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-dh-v-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberstamp|rubberstamp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-dh-v-th
|-
! Lemma
| kayadhvethoko
|}
